name: Gayle Moran
abstract: Gayle Moran (born 1943) is an American vocalist, keyboardist, and songwriter. She is from Spring Arbor, Michigan and graduated from Spring Arbor High School (now Spring Arbor University) in 1961.

concerts.label: Chick Corea and Gary Burton with String Quartet

about_quotes.speaker: Herbie Hancock
about_quotes.evidence: He had done some duets I guess with his, well his then-girlfriend, now wife, Gayle Moran, who was working in his band and she’s also a singer.
about_quotes.doc_title: Herbie Hancock interviewed by Michael Woods, New York City, New York, November 18, 1995

about_quotes.speaker: Bernie Kirsh
about_quotes.evidence: One is Chick, one is Steve Gadd, and the other is Gayle Moran, her vocals, all the way through.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bernie Kirsh interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, August 27, 2022
